title: tragacantha procera
intro: Tragacantha procera, also known as Astragalus gummifer, is a plant species belonging to the legume family that is native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, digestive problems, and cardiovascular diseases, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha procera include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
